title: getgoogleloginredirect
description: Verify that a GET request to /google/login redirects the user to the Google OAuth consent flow without requiring authentication.

title: getgooglecallbackvalidcode
description: Verify that a GET request to /google/callback with a valid authorization code establishes an authenticated session and redirects the user to the root / endpoint.

title: getgooglecallbackinvalidcode
description: Verify that a GET request to /google/callback with an invalid or expired authorization code results in authentication failure and the user remains unauthenticated.

title: getrootindexredirect
description: Verify that a GET request to / redirects the user to the appropriate landing page or portal based on their authentication status and role.

title: getstudentdashboardwithauth
description: Verify that a GET request to /student/dashboard with a valid authenticated student session returns HTTP 200 with the student dashboard content.

title: getstudentdashboardwithoutauth
description: Verify that a GET request to /student/dashboard without authentication returns HTTP 401 unauthorized or redirects to the authentication flow.

title: getadmindashboardwithauth
description: Verify that a GET request to /admin/dashboard with a valid authenticated admin session returns HTTP 200 with the admin dashboard content.

title: getadmindashboardwithoutauth
description: Verify that a GET request to /admin/dashboard without authentication returns HTTP 401 unauthorized or redirects to the authentication flow.
